---
title: "DAGs"
author: "Tyler Beaman"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Simple Dag

```{r}
#loading neccesary packages
#install.packages("ggdag")
library(ggdag)
library(dagitty)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#this is the DAG that represents the data we will use for answering the question
#code is from daggity

Simple_Dag <- dagitty('
dag {
  bb="0,0,1,1"
  "No Calf" [pos="0.484,0.041"]
  Behavior [outcome,pos="0.339,0.195"]
  Calf [pos="0.208,0.048"]
  "No Calf" -> Behavior
  Calf -> Behavior
}
')


plot(Simple_Dag)

```

```{r}
#this is the code for the more complex dag

Complex_Dag <- dagitty('
                       ')
```
